scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Optional admin login name. Defaults to `admin`; Unicode names and email-style usernames are supported.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Required for Deploy to Cloudflare unless you later configure `ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH`. Choose and save a 16-4096 character login password; the Deploy Button does not generate a recoverable password for you.

CODE_HASH_PEPPER.description: Required stable random secret for extraction-code hashing. Generate once with `openssl rand -hex 32`. Do not rotate it: existing extraction codes would stop validating.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Required stable random signing secret. Generate once with `openssl rand -hex 32`. Rotation invalidates admin sessions and short-lived download tokens.
